verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You have always been You will always be Faithful When I cry out to You God And my heart is overwhelmed You give

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I know I can trust you At all times Cause The One who is higher Stands by the my side

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hide me God In the shadows of your wings Draw me close I’m secured in Your holy embrace I will trust in You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God You are The One Who is steadfast strong and true Always… always….
